You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
The video shows snow falling at night in a park, with the camera following a walking path through the snow-covered ground. Bare trees and a few park benches line the path, dimly lit by distant streetlights that cast a yellowish glow against the dark surroundings. The snowflakes are visible as white particles falling steadily through the air, accumulating on the ground and surfaces. The handheld camera moves forward with moderate sway, capturing the continuous descent of snow and the subtle shifts in light as it advances along the path. The overall scene is dark, with the snow providing contrast against the shadowy park landscape.

Write one caption per style. Rules:
- Each caption is a single sentence, at most 30 words, in English.
- Every caption must reflect the actual content of the clip (subjects, actions, setting).
- "formal": Professional, objective, factual tone. No jokes, no slang.
- "sarcastic": Dry, ironic, lightly mocking. Deadpan delivery.
- "humorous_tech": Funny, built on technology or programming references (bugs, infinite loops, deploys, Wi-Fi, CPUs, git...).
- "humorous_non_tech": Funny, everyday observational humour anyone would get. Absolutely no technical jargon.

Example (for a clip of a dog chasing its tail on a lawn):
{
  "formal": "A golden retriever spins in circles chasing its tail on a sunlit suburban lawn.",
  "sarcastic": "Yes, keep spinning — the tail is definitely about to surrender any minute now.",
  "humorous_tech": "Infinite loop detected: dog.chase(tail) has no exit condition and the CPU is extremely fluffy.",
  "humorous_non_tech": "Somewhere on this lawn, a dog is losing a race against his own back half."
}

Respond with ONLY a JSON object with exactly these keys: "formal", "sarcastic", "humorous_tech", "humorous_non_tech".

{"formal": "A handheld camera advances along a snow-covered park path at night, illuminated by distant streetlights.", "sarcastic": "Great, another midnight stroll where the snow gets to fall and I get to trudge through it.", "humorous_tech": "Night mode deployed but buffer overflow: snowflakes exceeding maximum aesthetic threshold.", "humorous_non_tech": "Someone's romantic winter walk forgot to mention the part where you can't feel your toes."}

You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
In the cool blue light of early morning, an industrial robotic arm with bright orange joints stands on a concrete factory floor, systematically picking metal brackets from a conveyor belt and placing them into a gray assembly housing. The setting contains rows of metallic parts, yellow safety railings, and large shipping containers in the background. The robotic arm moves in precise, moderate lateral and vertical motions, rotating its mechanical claw to align each component. Simultaneously, an aerial drone camera glides smoothly forward and downward, tracking the arm’s continuous assembly process. The scene features contrasting tones of dark gray machinery against the vibrant orange of the moving robotic joints.

{"formal": "An industrial robotic arm with orange joints assembles metal brackets into a gray housing on a factory floor.", "sarcastic": "Look, the million-dollar arm is doing what a human could do if we still paid humans to do things.", "humorous_tech": "git commit -m 'final_final_bracket_v2_REAL' while the drone documents this deploy to production.", "humorous_non_tech": "This robot has better hand-eye coordination than me before my first coffee."}

Muted gray and blue tones dominate the scene, contrasted by the bright yellow markings and occasional red clothing worn by individuals. The camera remains completely stationary, capturing the swift, sporadic movements of the children against the slowly shifting morning light.
